title: Refactor defensive nil in 10+ call sites
prompt:
Given:

```
defmodule MyApp.Profile do
  def title(u), do: if is_nil(u), do: "", else: u.title || ""
  def bio(u), do: if is_nil(u), do: "", else: u.bio || ""
  def avatar(u), do: if is_nil(u), do: "/default.png", else: u.avatar || "/default.png"
  def url(u), do: if is_nil(u), do: "/", else: u.url || "/"
  def display_name(u), do: if is_nil(u), do: "Guest", else: u.display_name || "Guest"
end
```

Refactor so each function is two heads: one for `nil`, one for `%{<field>: v} when is_binary(v) and v != ""`, and a catch-all that returns the default. Do NOT use `||`. Output a complete `defmodule MyApp.Profile do ... end`.
tier_rationale: Five functions to refactor consistently. Tests the philosophy of uniform application.
